diagrams.title: Counting Rules Comparison
diagrams.content:
SUM RULE (OR)          PRODUCT RULE (AND)
─────────────────      ─────────────────
Task A: m ways         Task A: m ways
   OR                     AND
Task B: n ways         Task B: n ways
─────────────────      ─────────────────
Total: m + n           Total: m × n

Example:               Example:
3 buses OR 2 trains    3 shirts AND 4 pants
= 5 ways to travel     = 12 outfits

diagrams.title: Pigeonhole Principle
diagrams.content:
5 pigeons, 4 holes:

  🐦 🐦 🐦 🐦 🐦    →    [🐦🐦] [🐦] [🐦] [🐦]
                         Hole 1  H2   H3   H4

⌈5/4⌉ = 2 → At least one hole has ≥ 2 pigeons

visuals.title: Counting Principles
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Counting Principles</text>
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Multiplication Principle
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="170" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">Addition Principle
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Permutations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="170" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">Combinations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="100" y1="90" x2="100" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="220" y1="90" x2="220" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
